canonical_action: shrink the archive's page size (the chunk size written to object storage) to a smaller granularity, to cut the metered read cost
closure_reason: archive reads are served through a cache layer billed at a flat per-request rate regardless of page size, so a smaller page granularity does not reduce the metered read cost at all
measured_outcome: total pipeline cost changed by well under 1% when tried on a staging archive for two weeks; closed as not worth the migration churn
